scripts.deploy: pnpm build && cd worker && pnpm deploy
scripts.d1:create: cd worker && pnpm exec wrangler d1 create smart-vote-db
scripts.d1:migrate:local: cd worker && pnpm exec wrangler d1 migrations apply smart-vote-db --local
scripts.d1:migrate:remote: cd worker && pnpm exec wrangler d1 migrations apply smart-vote-db --remote
scripts.types: cd worker && pnpm exec wrangler types
